markdownRemark.html:
Redux Libraries & Learning Material

Redux is a state container for JavaScript apps.

  • Official website: devarchy.com/redux
  • Use devarchy to add a library to the catalog

Contents

  • Code Architecture
  • Utilities
  • Code Style
  • Dev tools / Inspection tools
  • React Integration
  • Other Integrations
  • Boilerplate
  • Miscellaneous
  • Learning Material
  • Community

Code Architecture

Aims to improve the overall structure of the source code. Makes reasoning about the code easier.

  • redux-schemastars157 - Automatic actions, reducers and validation for Redux.
  • redux-tcombstars213 - Immutable and type-checked state and actions for Redux.
  • redux-action-treestars230 - The Cerebral signals running with Redux.
  • redux-elmstars499 - The Elm Architecture in JavaScript.

Utilities

  • redux-ormstars2.9k - Small, simple and immutable ORM to manage relational data in your Redux store.
  • redux-api-middlewarestars1.5k - Redux middleware for calling an API.
  • redux-ignorestars835 - Higher-order reducer to ignore Redux actions.
  • redux-modifiersstars159 - Collection of generic functions for writing Redux reducers to operate on various data structures.
  • rereducestars167 - Reducer library for Redux.
  • redux-searchstars1.4k - Redux bindings for client-side search.
  • redux-loggerstars5.5k - Logger middleware for Redux.
  • redux-immutablestars1.9k - Redux-immutable is used to create an equivalent function of Redux combineReducers that works with Immutable.js state.
  • reselectstars17.9k - Selector library for Redux.
  • redux-requestsstars246 - Manages in-flight requests with a Redux reducer to avoid issuing duplicate requests.
  • redux-undostars2.7k - Higher order reducer to add undo/redo functionality to Redux state containers.
  • redux-bug-reporterstars683 - Bug reporter and bug playback tool for Redux.
  • redux-transducersstars129 - Transducer utilities for Redux.

Store Persistence

  • redux-storagestars682 - Persistence layer for Redux with flexible backends.
  • redux-persiststars11.3k - Persist and rehydrate a Redux store.

Side Effects

Side Effects / Asynchronous Actions

  • redux-sagastars21.6k - Alternative side effect model for Redux apps.
  • redux-promise-middlewarestars2k - Redux middleware for resolving and rejecting promises with conditional optimistic updates.
  • redux-effectsstars499 - You write pure functions, redux-effects handles the rest.
  • redux-thunkstars16.3k - Thunk middleware for Redux.
  • redux-connectstars551 - Provides decorator for resolving async props in react-router, extremely useful for handling server-side rendering in React.
  • redux-loopstars1.9k - Port of elm-effects and the Elm Architecture to Redux that allows you to sequence your effects naturally and purely by returning them from your reducers.
  • redux-side-effectsstars181 - Redux toolset for keeping all the side effects inside your reducers while maintaining their purity.
  • redux-logicstars1.8k - Redux middleware for organizing business logic and action side effects.
  • redux-observablestars7.6k - RxJS middleware for action side effects in Redux using "Epics".
  • redux-shipstars616 - Composable, testable and typable side effects.

Code Style

Aims to make parts of the source code easier to read/write.

  • redux-actstars1.5k - Opinionated lib to create actions and reducers for Redux.
  • redux-crudstars635 - Set of standard actions and reducers for Redux CRUD Applications.

Dev tools / Inspection tools

  • redux-devtools-inspectorstars242 - Another Redux DevTools Monitor.
  • redux-diff-loggerstars177 - Diff logger between states for Redux.
  • redux-devtools-chart-monitorstars294 - Chart monitor for Redux DevTools.
  • redux-devtoolsstars11.9k - DevTools for Redux with hot reloading, action replay, and customizable UI.
  • redux-devtools-dispatchstars145 - Dispatch your actions manually to test if your app Reacts well.
  • redux-devtools-dock-monitorstars399 - Resizable and movable dock for Redux DevTools monitors.
  • redux-devtools-filterable-log-monitorstars151 - Filterable tree view monitor for Redux DevTools.
  • redux-devtools-log-monitorstars309 - The default monitor for Redux DevTools with a tree view.
  • remote-redux-devtoolsstars1.7k - Redux DevTools remotely.

React Integration

  • redux-test-recorderstars491 - Redux middleware to automatically generate tests for reducers through ui interaction.
  • react-reduxstars20.9k - Official React bindings for Redux.
  • react-easy-universalstars210 - Universal Routing & Rendering with React & Redux was too hard. Now it's easy.
  • redux-form-material-uistars831 - Set of wrapper components to facilitate using Material UI with Redux Form.

Routing

  • redux-async-connectstars651 - It allows you to request async data, store them in Redux state and connect them to your React component.
  • redux-tiny-routerstars131 - Router made for Redux and made for universal apps. Stop using the router as a controller, it's just state.
  • redux-routerstars2.3k - Redux bindings for React Router – keep your router state inside your Redux store.
  • react-router-reduxstars7.9k - Ruthlessly simple bindings to keep react-router and Redux in sync.
  • ground-controlstars268 - Scalable reducer management & powerful data fetching for React Router & Redux.

Forms

  • redux-formstars12.5k - Higher Order Component using react-redux to keep form state in a Redux store.
  • react-redux-formstars2.1k - Create forms easily in React with Redux.

Component State

  • redux-react-localstars367 - Local component state via Redux.
  • redux-uistars642 - Easy UI state management for React Redux.

Other Integrations

Flux

  • redux-actionsstars6.6k - Flux Standard Action utilities for Redux.
  • redux-promisestars2.7k - FSA-compliant promise middleware for Redux.

Backbone

  • backbone-reduxstars186 - Easy way to keep your backbone collections and Redux store in sync.

Falcor

  • redux-falcorstars374 - Connect your Redux front-end to your falcor back-end.

RxJS

  • redux-observablestars7.6k - RxJS middleware for action side effects in Redux using "Epics".
  • rx-reduxstars419 - Reimplementation of Redux using RxJS.
  • redux-rxstars1k - RxJS utilities for Redux.
  • redurxstars98 - Redux'ish Functional State Management using RxJS.

Electron

  • redux-electron-storestars369 - Redux store enhancer that allows automatic synchronization between electron processes.

Deku

  • deku-reduxstars32 - Bindings for Redux in deku < v2.

Other

  • redux-rollbar-middleware - Redux middleware that wraps exceptions in actions and sends them to Rollbar with current state.
  • kasiastars219 - React Redux toolset for the WordPress API.

Boilerplate

Boilerplates / Scaffolds / Starter Kits / Generators / Stack Ensembles

  • redux-clistars892 - Opinionated CLI for building Redux/React apps quicker.
  • reactuatestars491 - React/Redux stack (not a boilerplate kit).
  • react-chrome-extension-boilerplatestars2k - Boilerplate for Chrome Extension React.js project.
  • universal-reduxstars462 - Npm package that lets you jump right into coding React and Redux with universal (isomorphic) rendering. Only manage Express setups or Webpack configurations if you want to.
  • generator-react-aspnet-boilerplatestars285 - Starting point for building isomorphic React applications with ASP.NET Core 1, leveraging existing techniques.
  • generator-reduxstars252 - CLI tools for Redux: next-gen functional Flux/React with devtools.
  • generator-react-webpack-reduxstars556 - React Webpack Generator including Redux support.
  • socratesstars575 - Small (8kb), batteries-included Redux store to reduce boilerplate and promote good habits.

Miscellaneous

  • redux-corestars43 - Minimal Redux.

Learning Material

  • Redux's concepts

    Redux official documentation does a great job at explaining Redux's core principles.

  • Why immutable data structures

    The guide on performance of React's official documentation explains well what immutable data structures are and why they play an important role.

  • Side Effects

    Redux Loop's readmestars1.9k gives a good insight on Side Effects in the context of Redux.

Reading the aforementioned material will get you a good start for writing apps with Redux. If you are curious for more, check out following resources.

  • Functional Programming - Basics

    This post goes over basic concepts of functional programming while building a YouTube instant search demo app.

  • Reactive Programming

    This introduction to Reactive Programming explains Reactive Programming with clarity.

  • Functional Programming - Going beyond

    Well written article that talks about interesting computer science concepts implemented in functional languages and how these apply to JavaScript.

  • Monads

    Curious about monads? Wikipedia gives a good overview on monads and this article explains monads in more details with graphics and simple examples.

Community

  • Reddit
  • Stack Overflow
  • Discord
  • Slack
  • Gitter
  • #rackt on freenode
